summary.matcher_observation: All currently unmatched official crossings fail before thresholding because the current matcher cannot find any overlapping OSM name candidate.
summary.km_fallback_observation: Same-line OSM candidates exist, but for these unmatched records none of those same-line OSM crossings expose railway:position, so the current matcher has no kilometer-based fallback.
